name: Travel Rewards Secured Credit Card
effective_cost: Free — no annual fee, but requires a refundable $200–$5,000 security deposit to set your limit

verdict.text: Same flat 1.5x travel/dining earn rate as the unsecured Travel Rewards, with no foreign transaction fees while you rebuild credit

earn_note: Identical flat 1.5x rate to the unsecured Travel Rewards card, with the same statement-credit redemption against travel and dining purchases. Secured card products are not eligible for the BofA Rewards relationship bonus that boosts the unsecured card's rate by 10–75%.

redemption_options.method: Statement credit against travel or dining purchases
Deposit to a Bank of America checking or savings account, or gift cards

points.note: Same redemption menu as the unsecured card — value tops out around 1¢/point, with no transfer-partner program.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners — points redeem directly as a statement credit against travel/dining purchases, or for cash/gift cards.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for fraudulent transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: No purchase-protection or extended-warranty guide published specifically for this card.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: $0 on purchases made outside the US — a rare perk on a secured card.

services.name: Deposit review for return
services.detail: Bank of America periodically reviews your account and, based on credit history, may qualify you to have your deposit returned — not guaranteed for all customers.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns points on their spend (into your account)
Their activity is reported to the credit bureaus too, on the same account

additional_cards.note: Free to add — since this account reports to the credit bureaus, an authorized user benefits from the payment history alongside the primary cardholder.
